Patch Set 6:

Ihara,

Panda (Andrew P.) provided some interesting performance data related to this in:
https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11164?focusedCommentId=242658&page=com.atlassian.jira.plugin.system.issuetabpanels%3Acomment-tabpanel#comment-242658

Just FYI, since you were involved in the earlier related patch.

Patch Set 6:

(2 comments)

So this patch is reducing the places where we allocate new lu_env, which is best because "no work is the fastest work".

I'm wondering if anyone has looked recently into making lu_env_init() more efficient in some way?  Could we keep a cache of previously-used lu_env available instead of creating a new one each time?  I know that not all lu_env are the same (they depend on the device stack being used), but there are not so many different stacks in use that we couldn't re-use them.

Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

Mark -1 just so we can get a better commit message, which I will fix momentarily.

(1 comment)

Patch Set 7:

I can reproduce the crash with racer too. I pushed https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/34541/ for testing just to see if there are any unresolved issues with this patch other than related to ofd_lvbo_update().

With 34541, racer passed successfully for a few times in a row on my testbox.

parents.subject: LU-11775 osc: check if opg is in lru list without locking

commit.subject: LU-12034 ldlm: pass env in few cases
commit.message:
LU-12034 ldlm: pass env in few cases

LU-11164 patch https://review.whamcloud.com/32832 added lu_env_init()
and lu_env_fini() call in ptlrpc_set_wait() that are not needed in
some cases.  This hurt createmany open+close performance after the
patch, and ftrace profiling isolated this to somewhere in mdc_close(),
as mdt_close() did not change in speed:

    Before LU-11164:
    total: 20000 open/close in 33.23 seconds: 601.83 ops/second
    ll_file_release:8576370.0:20000:428.0
    mdc_close:8149427.0:20000:407.0
    mdt_close:2930872.0:20000:146.0

    After LU-11164:
    total: 20000 open/close in 34.55 seconds: 578.94 ops/second
    ll_file_release:9271202.0:20000:463.0
    mdc_close:8846957.0:20000:442.0
    mdt_close:2967136.0:20000:148.0

Pass env to a few LDLM methods so they can pass it along to
ptlrpc_set_wait() in order to avoid env recreation on client side.

Fixes: e02cb40761ff ("LU-11164 ldlm: pass env to lvbo methods")
Reported-by: Andrew Perepechko <c17827@cray.com>
Change-Id: Ifc3e87a3bc3664e98e1dcceb9fd0e59c34d29ea3
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
